lines.text: I am an employee representative at NorthStar Logistics AG.
I want to talk about AI at work.
Some colleagues do not like the idea.
They think that jobs could be automated.
Data protection is also a topic.
And some people are not sure about computers.
On the other hand, AI can help us.
It saves time, for example the morning report is ready faster now.
It can reduce errors and make the work easier.
In conclusion, I think we should try it with clear rules.
